heading: Limitations
body:
The following limitations apply only to deployments hosted in
MongoDB Atlas. If any of these limits present a problem for your
organization, contact [Atlas support](atlas/support).

- You must use the [Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/stable/command/atlas-dbusers-create), [Atlas
  Administration API](atlas/reference/api-resources-spec/v2), Atlas UI, or
  a supported [integration](atlas/partner-integrations) to manage
  database users on Atlas clusters. Otherwise, Atlas rolls back
  any user modifications.

- The available Atlas [built-in roles](manual/reference/built-in-roles) and
  [specific privileges](atlas/security-add-mongodb-users)
  support a subset of MongoDB commands. For more information, see
  [Unsupported Commands in M10+ Clusters](atlas/unsupported-commands) for
  more information.

- You can create a maximum of 100 database users per Atlas project.
